summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of FOMO Market Data API v2.0. Unified exchange backend architecture with 4 providers tested. 80% success rate (24/30 tests passed). Core functionality working well with Coinbase fully operational and Hyperliquid mostly working. Regional blocking working as expected for Binance/Bybit.

rate_limiting_issues.issue: 429 Too Many Requests causing asset profile failures
rate_limiting_issues.error: Client error '429 Too Many Requests' for url 'https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info'

error_handling_improvements.issue: Invalid venue parameter returns 500 instead of proper error code

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Hyperliquid trades endpoint 500 error. Implement rate limiting/retry logic for Hyperliquid API calls to prevent 429 errors on asset profiles. Consider improving error handling for invalid venue parameters to return proper HTTP status codes instead of 500.
success_percentage: Backend: 80% (24/30 tests passed). Core health, providers, Coinbase fully functional. Hyperliquid mostly working except trades endpoint. Regional blocking working as expected.
